+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Enable Flash Attention on GGML/GGUF (feature now merged…",
+        "description": "- Add Flash Attention support #4051\n\nOnly enabled by default on a supported CUDA version or Metal is detected, configurable via params and the API.\n\nCredit to  who [took my broken idea and made it work](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/issues/4051#issuecomment-2092430887) 🎉\n```yaml\ncurl http://localhost:11434/v1/chat/completions -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" -d '{\n        \"model\": \"registry.internal/ollama/llama3-bartowski:8b-instruct-q8_0\",\n        \"messages\": [\n            {\n                \"role\": \"user\",\n                \"content\": \"Tell me two short jokes.\"\n            }\n        ]\n    }'\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade ollama to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade ollama:\n```bash\n# Check current version\nollama --version\n# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/ollama/ollama\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Enable Flash Attention on GGML/GGUF (feature now merged…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
